use rayon::prelude::*;

// BAD: parallel map producing nested vectors that are later flattened
fn expand_chunks(chunks: &[Chunk]) -> Vec<Item> {
    let nested: Vec<Vec<Item>> = chunks.par_iter()
        .map(|chunk| {
            let mut items = Vec::new();
            for entry in &chunk.entries {
                items.push(Item::from(entry));
            }
            items
        })
        .collect();

    nested.into_iter().flatten().collect()
}

fn process_and_split(records: &[Record]) -> Vec<Output> {
    let batches: Vec<Vec<Output>> = records.par_iter()
        .map(|record| {
            let mut outputs = Vec::new();
            for sub in &record.sub_records {
                outputs.push(process_single(sub));
            }
            outputs
        })
        .collect();

    batches.into_iter().flatten().collect()
}
